description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image and runs a global before_script that updates apk and installs doxygen, ttf-freefont, and graphviz. Define a test job (implicitly in the test stage) that executes the command doxygen documentation/doxygen/config.doxyfile. Configure the test job to run on all branches except master using an except rule. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
